title: GEEPAS Portable Flat Fan Heater 2000W | Low Running Cost with 2 Heat Settings 1000-2000W Overheat Protection | Upright/Flatbed Energy Efficient Heater with Cooling/Warm/Hot Wind Option | 2 Yr Warranty
features: ✅ LOW ENERGY COST – No one likes surprise bills at the end of the month. This energy-efficient electric heater for home keeps you cosy without draining your wallet. Stay warm, save money, and relax in comfort.

✅ 2 HEAT SETTINGS – Sometimes you just need a gentle touch of warmth, other times you want a powerful blast of heat. With 1000W and 2000W options in fan heater for home, you can match the mood or the season. Simply turn the dial and enjoy instant comfort.

✅ COOL, WARM & HOT OPTIONS – Imagine one portable heater that adapts as quickly as the weather changes. Use the cooling fan on a hot summer’s day, switch to warm wind in autumn, or enjoy hot heat on chilly winter nights. Year-round comfort is always by your side.
✅ VERSATILE FLATBED OR UPRIGHT HEATER FAN – This heater fan delivers safe, efficient warmth in either flat or upright positions, with built-in overheat protection for peace of mind all day.

✅ EASY THERMOSTAT CONTROL – Finding the perfect room temperature shouldn’t be complicated. With simple rotary dials, you set small heater once and the camping heater does the rest. Sit back, relax, and let it maintain your cosy bubble.

✅ LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE – Some days you want warmth in the living room, other days in your bedroom or even the bathroom. Thanks to car heater's compact build, moving it around feels effortless. Wherever you go, comfort follows.

✅ SAFE & RELIABLE BUILD – You’ll always know it’s on thanks to the bright indicator light, while the protective grill keeps low energy silent heater for home safe to touch. Designed for everyday use, it combines security with dependable heating. Feel warm, feel safe.

✅ VERSATILE & COMPACT – Whether you’re studying in your dorm, working in the office, or relaxing in your caravan, this portable heater for home fits right in. Its small size hides a powerful punch of warmth. One little unit, endless cosy moments.
description: Product Description VERSATILE TEMPERATURE CONTROL Settings including 'cool', 'warm' and 'hot', for a range of heating and cooling options. MULTIPLE HEAT SETTINGS This Fan heater creates the ideal temperature for you by offering multiple settings. INSTANT HEATING The fan circulates warm air quickly, providing immediate heat. PORTABLE DESIGN The Geepas fan heater light weight and easy to transport.
